{{CargoRelic
|name=Fake Jaden's Head
|class_id=20246
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This majestic dragon head came from a monster named Yazi. As the Dragon God's double, it cultivated years to obtain the ability to summon the Dragon God's projection and spent a lot of money on plastic surgery to look the same as the Dragon God!
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=31
|civ=14
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +10<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +20<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
